mapper.select:
SELECT ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, OPEN_ACCOUNT_BANK, BANK_CODE, BANK_NAME, BANK_NAME_ENGLISH, BANK_NUMBER, BANK_TYPE_CODE, BANK_TYPE_NAME, BANK_ACCOUNT_CODE, BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME, CURRENCY_CODE, CURRENCY_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME FROM T_FD_BANK_PAY
id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO T_FD_BANK_PAY( ID, COMPANY_ID, COMPANY_NAME, OPEN_ACCOUNT_BANK, BANK_CODE, BANK_NAME, BANK_NAME_ENGLISH, BANK_NUMBER, BANK_TYPE_CODE, BANK_TYPE_NAME, BANK_ACCOUNT_CODE, BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME, CURRENCY_CODE, CURRENCY_NAME, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{companyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{openAccountBank, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankNameEnglish, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccountCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankAccountName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currencyCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{currencyName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now} )
mapper.update:
UPDATE T_FD_BANK_PAY SET ID = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_ID = #{companyId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, COMPANY_NAME = #{companyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, OPEN_ACCOUNT_BANK = #{openAccountBank,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_CODE = #{bankCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_NAME = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_NAME_ENGLISH = #{bankNameEnglish,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_NUMBER = #{bankNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_TYPE_CODE = #{bankTypeCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_TYPE_NAME = #{bankTypeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_ACCOUNT_CODE = #{bankAccountCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME = #{bankAccountName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURRENCY_CODE = #{currencyCode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, CURRENCY_NAME = #{currencyName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_BY = #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, UPDATE_BY_NAME = #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, UPDATE_TIME = #{now}
id = #{id}
